mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total_price, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id, o.total_price, o.status, o.created_at FROM orders o JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND oi.product_id = #{productId} AND o.status = 'CREATED' ORDER BY o.created_at DESC, o.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 'CANCELED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'CREATED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) FROM orders o JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = #{productId}
